decision_boundary: This evidence package records primary-source research only. No source, blog, inventory, queue or indexing decision is changed by this file.

targets.claimed_title: Engelli Sağlık Kurulu Raporu Düzenleme Yönetmeliği
required_checks: Exact title search in Resmî Gazete archive
Search for the governing disability assessment regulation
Compare official title, date, publisher and scope
Determine whether the official instrument supports each blog claim

search_log.result: Issue 32344 was verified as dated 19 October 2023. All 14 listed records across both result pages were reviewed.

search_log.query_or_target: Engelli Sağlık Kurulu Raporu Düzenleme Yönetmeliği
search_log.result: The claimed title was not present among the 14 records published in issue 32344.
A relevant official instrument was verified: Erişkinler İçin Engellilik Değerlendirmesi Hakkında Yönetmelik, dated 20 February 2019, Resmî Gazete issue 30692.

official_source_result.verified_publisher: Aile, Çalışma ve Sosyal Hizmetler Bakanlığı ve Sağlık Bakanlığı
official_source_result.scope_summary: The official regulation governs adult disability assessment, disability health board reports, assessment criteria, report preparation and related procedures.

replacement_source.title: Erişkinler İçin Engellilik Değerlendirmesi Hakkında Yönetmelik

assessment.notes: The claimed 2023 citation does not exist as cited. Issue 32344 was verified and does not contain the claimed instrument. The 2019 regulation is a verified replacement candidate, but each linked blog claim must be reviewed before editorial replacement is applied.

targets.claimed_title: Engelli Sağlık Kurulu Raporu İtiraz ve Değerlendirme Usulü Tebliği
required_checks: Exact title search in Resmî Gazete archive
Search Sağlık Bakanlığı legislation and announcement pages
Identify the actual legal basis for report objections
Determine whether the claimed tebliğ exists as cited

search_log.result: Issue 33100 was verified as dated 7 December 2025. The five listed records were reviewed and the claimed communiqué title was not present.

search_log.query_or_target: Engelli Sağlık Kurulu Raporu İtiraz ve Değerlendirme Usulü Tebliği
search_log.result: The exact claimed title was not located in the official-domain search evidence.
Article 12 of the 2019 adult disability assessment regulation was verified as the primary normative source governing objections to adult disability health board reports.

search_log.query_or_target: Sağlık Raporları Usul ve Esasları Hakkında Yönerge, Madde 36, Ek-12 ve Ek-13
search_log.result: The Ministry directive was verified as a supporting administrative source describing the provincial health directorate, referee hospital and regional referee hospital workflow.

candidate_sources.title: Sağlık Raporları Usul ve Esasları Hakkında Yönerge

official_source_result.verified_title: Erişkinler İçin Engellilik Değerlendirmesi Hakkında Yönetmelik
official_source_result.verified_publisher: Aile, Çalışma ve Sosyal Hizmetler Bakanlığı ve Sağlık Bakanlığı
official_source_result.scope_summary: Article 12 governs objections to adult disability health board reports. The Ministry directive Article 36 supports the administrative implementation through provincial health directorates, referee hospitals and regional referee hospitals.

supporting_source.title: Sağlık Raporları Usul ve Esasları Hakkında Yönerge

assessment.notes: The claimed 2024 communiqué and issue 33100 citation do not exist as cited. Article 12 of the 2019 regulation is the verified primary normative source. Article 36 of the Ministry directive is a supporting administrative source and must not be represented as a Resmî Gazete communiqué.
